note: Vermont has no national chain truck stops. The historic P&H Truck Stop at Wells River (now Maplefields) on I-91 is the main full-service stop in the state. Interstate rest areas and welcome centers offer limited truck parking, no fuel.

stops.name: Sharon Welcome Center (VT Vietnam Veterans Memorial)
stops.notes: Northbound; welcome center with truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Randolph Rest Areas
stops.notes: NB and SB; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Williston Rest Areas
stops.notes: NB and SB near Burlington; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Highgate Welcome Center
stops.notes: Southbound, just below the Canadian border; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Guilford Welcome Center
stops.notes: Northbound, just past MA line; large welcome center with truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: P&H Truck Stop (Maplefields Wells River)
stops.notes: Legendary P&H Truck Stop, acquired by Maplefields; 24-hour fuel, restaurant, overnight truck parking, at US-302

stops.name: Derby Line Welcome Center
stops.notes: Southbound, at the Canadian border; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Waterford Welcome Center
stops.notes: Serves traffic entering VT from NH; truck parking, no fuel. No truck stops on this short segment
